allow: Bash(bun -e "const {Database}=require\('bun:sqlite'\); const db=new Database\('data/library.sqlite'\); console.log\(db.query\(\\"select name from sqlite_master where type='table' order by name\\"\).all\(\).map\(r=>r.name\).join\('\\n'\)\)")

Bash(bun -e "import {Database} from 'bun:sqlite'; const db=new Database\('data/library.sqlite'\); console.log\(db.query\(\\"select name from sqlite_master where type='table' and name not like 'sqlite_%' and name not like '__drizzle%' order by name\\"\).all\(\).map\(r=>r.name\).join\('\\n'\)\)")
